productDisplayName: Lakme Absolute Plump & Shine Plumshine Lip Gloss 3 ml
description: SHADE NAMEPlumshineWHAT IT IS?It's a lip gloss with a luscious sheen and has been dermatologically tested to give you a smooth gliding consistency that is very light on the lips.WHAT IT DOES?Contains Marine Collagen & high-shine pigments that keeps your lips full and hydrated at all timesGives your lips a moist pink shineLasts upto 6 hoursFEATURESHigh-shine pigmentsRevolutionary 3D glossDermatologically testedSmooth Gliding consistencyAvailable in a range of trendy and glamorous shadesGlossy ShineABOUT THE COLLECTIONThe Lakme Absolute Plump & Shine lip gloss is a lip gloss format that has a smooth gliding consistency that gives your lips the moist pink shine that's healthy looking and pretty! The range is very light on the lips and extremely easy to apply with the stroke of the applicator. Add a moisturizing glossy shimmer to your lips and you'll be ready to step out in an instant- get the Lakme Absolute Plump & Shine lip gloss now.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
